title: Darkest Garden
description: Adds a new boss to the Pale Garden!!!
body:
![Darkest Garden (Title)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af3a777b411c41c155991f6b45e0c74883187304_0.webp)

‎ 

## ‎ ‎   **What this mod does:**
> When a player drinks an **Ominous Bottle** at night in a **Pale Garden**, a **Sillhouette** will spawns.
When this **Silhouette** dies, it transforms into the **Shadow Shapeshifter**, a new aggressive monster.
> 
> When the **Shadow Shapeshifter** dies, it will drop a new weapon.
> This new weapon is the **Shadow Scythe**, which is a faster alternative to an axe in combat.

‎ 
‎ 

![Shadow Shapeshifter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5fd433fc49215370ac30127f3305c14912d08b5.png)

![Shadow Scythe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec58963a3490b349f328addf5fcba4e06e713c12.png)
